arts.ttl: Genoa vs Atalanta Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Genoa, sitting in 13th place, host Atalanta, who are currently occupying the third spot in the league, in their upcoming Serie A clash. The match is scheduled for May 17, 2025, at 19:45 GMT. Genoa vs...

Atalanta have won four of their last five Serie A games (D1): as many wins as they collected in their previous 14 league matches (D6 L4). No team have scored fewer first half goals than Genoa in the big five European leagues 2024/25: only eight, level with Montpellier; on the other hand, only Inter have netted more (37) than Atalanta (36) in the first 45 minutes of play in the current Serie A season.
